sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60468" key="kua/nwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠᾰ´ν-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (as if from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Κυανόω</foreign>) <sense id="n60468.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dark-blue colour</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.879d</biblScope> </bibl> codd.</sense> </entryFree>
